gates.title: Product Knowledge fails release when managed backend surfaces drift
evidence_required: scripts/verify_product_surface_alignment.py reconciles backend route families with catalog capabilities and source refs
scripts/pre-release-verify.sh runs product-surface before managed-mcp-lock, release readiness and pytest
tests/test_product_surface_alignment.py covers valid alignment, unmapped managed route prefixes and missing backend source refs

gates.title: Structured Product Knowledge catalog includes managed communications and backend source refs
evidence_required: src/product_knowledge/catalog.json includes managed communications providers and updated support/credits/cards backend source refs
scripts/verify_product_kb.py includes the product surface alignment result in its release-blocking validation
tests/test_product_knowledge.py keeps search, answers, handlers, validation and system catalog discoverability covered

gates.title: Packaged installs receive the managed MCP runtime package on the 7.30.22 version boundary
evidence_required: bin/nexo-brain.js copies managed_mcp as a runtime package
src/auto_update.py preserves managed_mcp during packaged updates and copies the managed MCP runner

gates.title: Managed MCP provider locks are checked against npm latest before release
evidence_required: scripts/verify_managed_mcp_lock.py compares src/managed_mcp/lock.json against npm latest version, integrity, tarball and binary metadata
scripts/pre-release-verify.sh still runs the managed-mcp-lock step before release readiness and pytest
tests/test_managed_mcp_release_gate.py covers stale locks, update behavior and MCP binary selection

gates.title: Public tool map includes managed MCP, closure-plane and product tools
evidence_required: tool-enforcement-map.json includes the live server tools
scripts/verify_tool_map.py passes against server.py and plugin tools

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.30.22
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page and sitemap reference v7.30.22
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.30.22
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.30.22 contract before tag publish
